HGSS.619.0000:
The Lake of Rage is actually a crater
made by rampaging GYARADOS.\f
The crater filled up with rainwater,
and the lake was formed.\f
That’s the story passed on from my
grandpa’s great-great-grandpa.\f
It used to be that you could catch
lively MAGIKARP there, but...\f
I don’t understand what’s happening.
HGSS.619.0001:
The Lake of Rage hasn’t been normal
since those men wearing black arrived.
HGSS.619.0002:
The Lake of Rage is back to normal.
The MAGIKARP have returned.\f
I may yet achieve my dream of seeing
the world’s largest MAGIKARP.\f
Do you have a Rod?
Please help me if you do.
HGSS.619.0003:
Ah, you have a MAGIKARP!
Let’s see how big that baby is.\f
HGSS.619.0004:
[0134,0000,0000].[0132,0001,0000] inches!
A MAGIKARP of [0134,0000,0000].[0132,0001,0000] inches!\f
Wow! This one is outstanding!
I tip my hat to you!\f
Take this as a memento!\f
HGSS.619.0005:
The record is the important thing.
Think of that as a bonus!
HGSS.619.0006:
[0134,0000,0000].[0132,0001,0000] inches!\f
That’s wonderful!
...Or not.\r
I’ve seen a MAGIKARP\r
of the same size before.
HGSS.619.0007:
This MAGIKARP is [0134,0000,0000].[0132,0001,0000] inches.\f
But I’ve already seen a MAGIKARP that
was [0134,0002,0000].[0132,0003,0000] inches.
HGSS.619.0009:
...Your Bag is too full!
Nothing will fit...
HGSS.619.0010:
Oh... So you didn’t get one good
enough to show me?\r
Maybe next time.
